message:
feat(fixtures): add test fixture factories for reducing boilerplate (br-9uv)

Implements RequestFactory, ResponseFactory, AuthFactory, JsonFactory,
JwtFactory, and UserFactory with builder patterns. Each factory provides
convenient methods for creating test data with sensible defaults.

- RequestFactory: HTTP request building with method/path/headers/body
- ResponseFactory: HTTP response building with status/headers/body
- AuthFactory: Static methods for Bearer tokens and Basic auth headers
- JsonFactory: JSON object/array/value generation helpers
- JwtFactory: JWT payload building with standard claims
- UserFactory: User object generation with common fields

Includes 14 unit tests covering all factory functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
